subject: Bump step-security/harden-runner from 2.14.1 to 2.15.1
commit_message:
Bump step-security/harden-runner from 2.14.1 to 2.15.1

## Release notes

Sourced from step-security/harden-runner's releases.

v2.15.1
What's Changed

Fixes step-security/harden-runner#642 bug due to which post step was failing on Windows ARM runners

Updates npm packages

Full Changelog: https://github.com/step-security/harden-runner/compare/v2.15.0...v2.15.1
v2.15.0
What's Changed
Windows and macOS runner support
We are excited to announce that Harden Runner now supports Windows and macOS runners, extending runtime security beyond Linux for the first time.
Insights for Windows and macOS runners will be displayed in the same consistent format you are already familiar with from Linux runners, giving you a unified view of runtime activity across all platforms.
Full Changelog: https://github.com/step-security/harden-runner/compare/v2.14.2...v2.15.0
v2.14.2
What's Changed
Security fix: Fixed a medium severity vulnerability where outbound network connections using sendto, sendmsg, and sendmmsg socket system calls could bypass audit logging when using egress-policy: audit. This issue only affects the Community Tier in audit mode; block mode and Enterprise Tier were not affected. See GHSA-cpmj-h4f6-r6pq for details.
Full Changelog: https://github.com/step-security/harden-runner/compare/v2.14.1...v2.14.2

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/aai-model-loader-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk17/17/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/aai-model-loader-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk17/17

Abandoned

Abandoning: master branch already has this dependency at the target version (or newer). This change is redundant.

Context: A historical bug in lfreleng-actions/github2gerrit-action caused incorrect change correlation when dependabot updated existing PRs in place, leaving orphaned Gerrit changes. This cleanup resynchronises Gerrit with GitHub state. Dependabot will re-raise an equivalent change if a newer version becomes available.
